design_vision.vibe: Deeply peaceful, contemplative, ethereal. Aurora borealis meets zen garden.
core_principles: Use deep forest greens, warm sand, and muted moss to create an earthy night atmosphere.
Treat the interface as a 'Control Room' (Dense, Scannable) but styled as 'Crystal Glass' over an organic backdrop.
Motion must be fluid, slow, and meditative, never abrupt.

layout_and_spacing.strategy: Mode B: The 'Control Room' Grid but expanded for an immersive dashboard.
layout_and_spacing.container: h-screen w-screen overflow-hidden bg-[#08120F] text-[#E8E3D9] flex flex-col md:flex-row p-4 md:p-6 gap-6

panels.left_sidebar: w-full md:w-80 flex flex-col gap-6 h-full z-10
panels.center_stage: flex-1 flex flex-col items-center justify-center relative rounded-3xl overflow-hidden border border-[rgba(92,158,140,0.15)] bg-black/20
panels.right_sidebar: w-full md:w-[360px] flex flex-col gap-6 h-full z-10 overflow-y-auto custom-scrollbar

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Generous internal padding. Cards use p-6 or p-8.

surfaces.glass_panel: backdrop-blur-2xl bg-[#14261F]/40 border border-[#5C9E8C]/10 rounded-2xl shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.4)]

auth.style: Glassmorphism panel centrally aligned. Inputs with border-b only or highly rounded filled inputs with soft earthy backgrounds.

solfeggio_grid.item_style: flat_card hover:bg-[#1A332A] transition-colors p-4 flex flex-col items-center justify-center cursor-pointer group
solfeggio_grid.active_state: The 'Tracing Beam' effect: dynamic border glow. text-[#72C2AC]

custom_generator.elements: Shadcn Slider customized with #5C9E8C track. Number input with JetBrains Mono font. Waveform toggle (Sine, Square, Triangle) using group buttons.

ambient_mixer.elements: List of nature sounds (Rain, Ocean, Forest). Each has a horizontal volume slider and an icon (lucide-react). Slider tracks should use #C4A67A for visual distinction from main frequency.

active_player_centerpiece.visuals: React Three Fiber (R3F) Canvas or WebGL fluid simulation. A central abstract geometry (like an organic sphere or aurora waves) that subtly distorts based on frequency state.
active_player_centerpiece.breathwork_overlay: SVG or Framer Motion circle in the exact center. Expands/contracts slowly (e.g., 4s inhale, 4s hold, 6s exhale). Uses a delicate 1px stroke of #72C2AC.

timer_controls.layout: Absolute bottom of center_stage or integrated in right_sidebar.
timer_controls.elements: Large digital countdown in JetBrains Mono. Minimalist Play/Pause/Stop buttons (lucide-react icons, 32px).

motion_and_interactions.transitions: Use specific properties: transition-colors duration-300 ease-out, transform duration-200.
motion_and_interactions.visualizer: The central visual must continuously animate smoothly using requestAnimationFrame. Opacity transitions when audio plays/stops.

image_urls.description: Subtle green/purple aurora over water. Use as a heavily blurred, very low opacity (10-15%) background layer behind the app container to give an ethereal ambient glow.
Zen garden rock texture. Use as subtle texture for ambient sound mixer covers or empty states.
Abstract moss texture. Use for 'Forest' ambient track thumbnail or saved session cards.

testing_attributes.rules: All interactive elements MUST have a data-testid attribute in kebab-case.

instructions_to_main_agent.tech_stack: React.js (NOT TSX), Tailwind CSS, Shadcn UI, Framer Motion, Web Audio API, Lucide React.
setup_commands: yarn add framer-motion lucide-react @radix-ui/react-slider @radix-ui/react-dialog @radix-ui/react-tabs clsx tailwind-merge
instructions_to_main_agent.audio_implementation: Use the native Web Audio API (AudioContext) for the pure tones. Implement a master gain node and individual gain nodes for ambient tracks. Ensure the AudioContext is resumed on first user interaction.
instructions_to_main_agent.ui_implementation: Rely heavily on Tailwind for the glassmorphism effects (`backdrop-blur-xl`, `bg-black/20`, etc.). Strip default Shadcn 'Vercel' looks; replace borders with `border-[#5C9E8C]/15` and add appropriate padding.
instructions_to_main_agent.visualizer: If R3F is too heavy to implement fully in one shot, fallback to a robust Canvas API or CSS/Framer Motion organic blob that scales/pulses with the `timer` and audio state. It must look premium.
